name: GitHub Organization
description: A GitHub organization that groups users and repositories together under shared ownership, permissions, and policies.

login.description: The login name of the organization.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID for the organization.

url.description: The API URL for the organization.

html_url.description: The URL of the organization on GitHub.

repos_url.description: API URL for the organization's repositories.

events_url.description: API URL for the organization's events.

hooks_url.description: API URL for the organization's webhooks.

issues_url.description: API URL for the organization's issues.

members_url.description: API URL template for the organization's members.

public_members_url.description: API URL template for the organization's public members.

avatar_url.description: URL to the organization's avatar image.

name.description: The display name of the organization.

company.description: The company name associated with the organization.

blog.description: The organization's blog or website URL.

email.description: The organization's publicly visible email address.

is_verified.description: Whether the organization has verified its domain.

has_organization_projects.description: Whether the organization has projects enabled.

has_repository_projects.description: Whether repositories can have projects enabled.

following.description: The number of users the organization is following.

created_at.description: The date and time the organization was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the organization was last updated.

default_repository_permission.description: The default permission level for new repositories.

members_can_create_public_repositories.description: Whether members can create public repositories.

members_can_create_private_repositories.description: Whether members can create private repositories.

two_factor_requirement_enabled.description: Whether two-factor authentication is required for members.

total_private_repos.description: The total number of private repositories.

owned_private_repos.description: The number of private repositories owned by the organization.

Plan.description: The billing plan for the organization.

space.description: The amount of disk space available in KB.

private_repos.description: The number of private repos allowed.

seats.description: The total number of seats available.
